meta.title: Analyzing the ICS Asset Inventory / Detection Market
meta.description:
Dale Peterson at the Protect Our Power event provides candid analysis of the most competitive security product space ... asset inventory and detection.

First - will this be one product/market? two? or more?
6:08 the ICS Asset Inventory / Vulnerability Management / Asset Management  products
12:30 the ICS Detection Market
25:42 KEY POINT ... go slow on this and prepare management that you may move to a different approach / solution in 2 years
27:20 the current tiering / winners in the ICS detection category
35:15 Q&A
